title: Add Author Section to README
description: Insert an 'Author' section into the project's README file to credit the creator or maintainers.
details: Open the README.md file located at the root of the project. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical place, such as after the introduction or installation sections). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or links (e.g., GitHub profile, email). Ensure formatting matches the rest of the README (use Markdown headings and consistent style).
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file to confirm the 'Author' section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, preview the Markdown rendering to ensure visual consistency.
